entries.name: Brave Search MCP
entries.description: 基于 Brave 引擎的网页搜索 / Web search powered by Brave Search engine
useCases: search the web for recent news or articles / 搜索最近的新闻或文章
find information across the public web / 在公网上查找信息

envKeys.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
envKeys.description: Brave Search API key (2k queries/month free tier)
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. 注册 Brave Search API 账号
2. 进入 keys 页面
3. Subscribe to free tier (2k queries/month)
4. 复制 API key

entries.name: Etherscan MCP
entries.description: 查询以太坊及 60+ EVM 链的链上数据 / Query Ethereum and 60+ EVM chain on-chain data
useCases: verify a transaction hash on Ethereum / 验证以太坊交易哈希
fetch a verified contract's source / 获取已验证合约源码
list ERC20 / NFT transfers for an address / 查询地址的 ERC20/NFT 转账记录
switch chain via chainId for L2s (Arbitrum/Optimism/Base/...) / 通过 chainId 切换 L2 链

envKeys.name: ETHERSCAN_API_KEY
envKeys.description: Etherscan API key (free tier sufficient for most reads)
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. 访问 https://etherscan.io/register 注册账号
2. 登录后前往 https://etherscan.io/myapikey
3. Create a new API Key
4. 复制 key 粘贴到此处

entries.name: Filesystem MCP
entries.description: 本地文件系统读写 / Local filesystem read/write
useCases: read files from a local directory / 读取本地目录下的文件
list directory contents / 列出目录内容
search files by pattern / 按模式搜索文件

entries.name: GitHub MCP
entries.description: 读取 GitHub repos、issues、pull requests / Read GitHub repos, issues, pull requests
useCases: read source code from public or private repos / 读取公开或私有仓库的源码
search issues and PRs by keyword / 按关键词搜索 issue 和 PR
list a repository's recent commits / 列出仓库的最近提交

envKeys.name: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
envKeys.description: GitHub personal access token, scope: repo (read)
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic)
2. Generate new token (classic)
3. 勾选 'repo' scope (读权限即可)
4. Generate, 立刻复制 token (只显示一次)
5. 粘贴到此处

entries.name: Playwright MCP
entries.description: 浏览器自动化,实测网页交互 / Browser automation for testing real web interactions
useCases: measure actual page-load timings / 实测网页加载时间
test cross-chain bridge UX flows / 测试跨链桥的 UX 流程
extract data from JS-rendered pages / 抓取 JS 渲染页的数据

entries.name: PostgreSQL MCP
entries.description: Postgres 数据库只读查询 / Read-only PostgreSQL queries
useCases: run SELECT queries against a database / 对数据库跑 SELECT 查询
explore database schema / 探索数据库 schema

envKeys.name: POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. 从你的数据库管理面板拿到 connection string
2. 形如 'postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname'

entries.name: Puppeteer MCP
entries.description: headless Chromium 浏览器控制 / Headless Chromium browser control
useCases: screenshot a web page / 给网页截图
scrape JS-heavy sites / 抓取 JS 重的站点

entries.name: Slack MCP
entries.description: 读 Slack 频道消息 / Read Slack channel messages
useCases: search recent slack discussions / 搜索 Slack 上的最近讨论
fetch a channel's recent messages / 抓取频道的最近消息

envKeys.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. 创建 Slack app
2. 启用 Bot Token Scopes (channels:history, channels:read 等)
3. Install app to workspace
4. 复制 Bot User OAuth Token

envKeys.name: SLACK_TEAM_ID
envKeys.description: Slack workspace team ID (T...) — viewable in Workspace Admin URL
envKeys.obtainSteps:
1. Sign in to https://app.slack.com/admin
2. URL bar shows /admin/T<TEAM_ID> — copy the T... value
3. Paste here
